howItWorks.intro: This ai image generation cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Monthly Cost = Images per Day × Days × Cost per Image
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: Which AI image generator is cheapest?
faq.answer: Stability AI's API is cheapest at ~$0.02/image. DALL-E 3 standard is $0.04/image. Midjourney's basic plan at $10/month is cheapest for moderate usage (up to 200 images).

faq.question: Is the AI Image Generation Cost Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What service should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate service value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

faq.question: Can I use this calculator on my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI Image Generation Cost Calculator is fully responsive and works on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop. No app download needed.

sections.title: What Is the AI Image Generation Cost Calculator?
sections.body: The AI Image Generation Cost Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your service, images per day, days per month, you get instant results including total images/month, monthly cost, cost per image. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting total images/month right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your service and need to find the right total images/month. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

tips: Double-check your service before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
